stemHtml: In the event of a planned track change of more than 15° in the NTOFP, what is the maximum bank angle allowed and obstacle clearance height requirement?

options.a: Maximum bank angle 15° with a vertical obstacle clearance height of 35 ft with reference to net path.
options.b: Maximum bank angle 25° with a vertical obstacle clearance height of 35 ft with reference to gross path.
options.c: Maximum bank angle 15° with a vertical obstacle clearance height of 50 ft with reference to gross path.
options.d: Maximum bank angle 25° with a vertical obstacle clearance height of 50 ft with reference to net path.
